summary: Crystal‑clear soundboard capture of the Saratoga show with Bill’s tight drumming highlighted.
review: Both reviewers give the recording four stars, praising its crystal‑clear clarity and the solid work by Bill (drums). The source is a soundboard (SBD) file, delivering excellent fidelity, though no specific musical moments or songs are called out in the comments. Overall the listening experience is positive despite the lack of detailed set commentary.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews focus on high recording quality and Bill’s performance; limited musical detail keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the audio as crystal clear with no noted flaws; “Nice job Bill” suggests a well‑balanced mix highlighting the drums.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on song selection or pacing; reviewers concentrate on recording quality rather than performance details.

band_member_comments.Drums: Bill’s drumming is praised as tight and well‑executed.
